Home / Partners & Alliance Network

Partners & Alliance
Network

Building together with industry leaders across manufacturing, construction, healthcare, and emergency response.

Explore the network Become a partner
Alliance

A network built for complex programs

Global Modular Partners curates an alliance network that unites manufacturing scale, construction execution, healthcare delivery, and emergency-response readiness. Together, we shorten procurement cycles, de-risk delivery, and align every stakeholder to a single program standard.

Whether you are a public agency, a healthcare operator, or a commercial developer, our partners extend GMP's reach with specialized capabilities—without sacrificing compliance, safety, or schedule integrity.

Strategic Partners

Leaders across every critical vertical

Each relationship is intentional: complementary strengths, shared accountability, and a commitment to modular excellence from factory floor to final inspection.

West Modular Manufacturing

Manufacturing

Modular factory production and volumetric unit fabrication.

PROSET Construction

Construction

General contracting and on-site modular assembly.

TRUE NORTH Compliance

Compliance

Regulatory compliance, permitting, and code consulting.

EnTech Engineering

Engineering

Structural, mechanical, and electrical engineering services.

Agbayani Construction Corporation

Construction

Civil and modular general contracting.

STREAM Logistics

Logistics

Module transportation, shipping, and delivery coordination.

ATCCO Construction

Construction

Specialty construction and installation services.

Petra Air Conditioning

MEP

HVAC systems design and installation for modular units.

Petra Aluminum

Materials

Aluminum fabrication for facades and structural components.

Abstract Architecture

Architecture

Architectural design and BIM coordination.

Collaborate

Become a partner

We welcome organizations that share our standards for quality, transparency, and mission-driven delivery. Tell us about your capabilities—we'll explore alignment with active programs and future pipeline opportunities.

Start a conversation
Certifications

Licenses & Certifications

Global Modular Partners maintains federal certifications, ISO registrations, and multi-state contractor licenses so procurement officers and compliance teams can move forward with confidence.

SDVOSB

Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business

Verified SDVOSB status supporting federal set-asides, sole-source pathways, and subcontracting goals for agencies and primes.

8(a)

SBA 8(a) Business Development Program

Participation in the 8(a) program to accelerate capability reviews, mentor-protégé structures, and compliant teaming arrangements.

ISO 9001

Quality Management System

Certified QMS alignment for documented processes, audit readiness, and consistent quality across design, fabrication, and delivery.

CAGE

Commercial and Government Entity Code

Registered CAGE code for SAM.gov visibility, contract vehicle eligibility, and standardized government entity identification.

State contractor licenses

Active licensing across key Western markets supports regional programs, public works, and cross-border logistics for modular deployment.

CaliforniaNevadaArizonaTexasOregon

Ready to build with GMP?

Connect with our partnerships team to scope integration, compliance, and delivery models tailored to your next modular initiative.
